nasb.text: Then summoning him, his lord *said to him, ‘You wicked slave, I forgave you all that debt because you pleaded with me.

esv.text: Then his master summoned him and said to him, ‘You wicked servant! I forgave you all that debt because you pleaded with me.

cnv.text: 於是主人叫他來，對他說：‘你這個惡僕，你求我，我就免了你欠我的一切。

ccb.text: “于是，王把那奴仆召来，说，‘你这可恶的奴才！你哀求我，我就免了你所有的债。

csbs.text: “于是主人把那奴仆叫来，对他说：‘你这恶奴！因为你求我，我就免了你所有的债。
